item.title: Belgium summons U.S. ambassador over tweet accusing kingdom of antisemitism
item.description: Belgium has summoned the U.S. ambassador after he accused the country of antisemitic prosecution over a Jewish circumcision case

item.title: New Orleans celebrates Mardi Gras, the indulgent conclusion of Carnival season
item.description: People are celebrating Mardi Gras in New Orleans on Tuesday with parades, revelry and costumes

item.title: Winning numbers drawn in Monday’s Powerball
item.description: The winning numbers in Monday evening’s drawing of the "Powerball" game were: 16-18-19-56-58, Powerball: 6

item.title: California walloped by winter storm with high winds and heavy rain and snow
item.description: California is being walloped by a powerful winter storm carrying thunderstorms, strong winds and heavy snow in the mountains

item.title: US troops arrive in Nigeria to help train its military, Nigerian military says
item.description: The Nigerian military says about 100 U.S. troops plus equipment have arrived in Nigeria to help train soldiers in the West African country
